## Screenshots or Logs

Add screenshots or logs for UI, playback, or behavior changes. Remove private data before posting.

## Copyright Resource Check

- [ ] This PR does not add copyright-protected full audio, complete commercial lyrics, commercial cover art, or singer images.
- [ ] Any new media resource is original, redistributable, or documented with source and license.
- [ ] This PR does not include `local_music.private.json` or private local resources.

## Permission or Privacy Check

- [ ] This PR does not add new permissions.
- [ ] This PR changes permissions or privacy behavior and explains the reason above.
- [ ] This PR does not include real accounts, phone numbers, email addresses, API keys, tokens, certificates, or private endpoints.

## Self-Test Checklist

- [ ] I ran or manually verified the affected flow.
- [ ] I updated documentation when behavior, setup, permissions, or resource boundaries changed.
- [ ] I added or updated tests when changing parser, repository, or playback state logic.
- [ ] I kept unrelated refactors out of this PR.
